title: Tierfon Rebel Outpost
content:

'''Tierfon Rebel Outpost''', also known as the '''Tierfon Rebel Base''', was one of the many thousands of small outposts that the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] owned. A [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] known as the [[Tierfon Yellow Aces/Legends|Tierfon Yellow Aces]] was based at [[Tierfon/Legends|Tierfon]]. One hundred and fifty eight [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] were stationed at the base so the squadron could go on mission after mission, but the personnel would still be well rested.

The hangar of the base had room for eight starfighters, which were usually [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]], a light [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] such as a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]], and several [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]] for use on the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] surface.

In the event of the base being discovered by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], it could easily be stripped and abandoned, as it usually took at least two weeks for reinforcements to arrive since the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] was not heavily occupied by the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

Famous [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] that were based on Tierfon included [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]] and [[Jek Tono Porkins/Legends|Jek Tono Porkins]], heroes of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]].<ref name="Galaxy Guide 3">''[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back]]''</ref> [[Tomer Darpen/Legends|Tomer Darpen]] and [[Kissek Doran]], father of [[Kell Tainer]], were also pilots in the Tierfon Yellow Squadron.<ref name="X-wing:Wraith Squadron">''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]''</ref> [[N'dru Suhlak]] on the other hand, while an accomplished pilot, was forced out of the base for his excessive insubordination.<ref name="Slave Ship">''[[Slave Ship]]''</ref> [[Veedo Vaocan]], a rare [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] pacifist, served as chief surgeon.<ref name="Heroes and Rogues">''[[Heroes & Rogues]]''</ref>

==History==
[[File:TSWSB-TierfonRebelBase.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Tierfon Rebel Outpost diagram]]
After the destruction of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] and the true threat of the first [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] was realized, Tierfon's status was boosted to "full active." However, the fighter contingent on the base was significantly reduced, with other less protected bases in need of greater fighter cover such as [[Great Temple/Legends|Yavin Base]].<ref name="Galaxy Guide 3" />

Prior to being assigned to Yavin Base, Janson was awarded the rank of [[True Gunner]] for performance excellence by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] at an awards ceremony at the base.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 3" />

The Alliance employed [[Electrotelescope/Legends|electrotelescopes]] as an early-warning system at Tierforn Rebel Outpost. The passive [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] could be deployed without giving away the outpost's location since they only detected incoming light and energy emissions.<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>

The base was in use throughout the whole of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and remained in use for many years afterward during the time of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
